channel.title: Bare Metal Cloud Status - Incident History

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L121B09 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 28, 07:00 - 09:00 UTC

Apr 30, 22:20 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 28/05/2026 07:00 UTC
End time : 28/05/2026 09:00 UTC
Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack L107B09 maintenance notification
item.description:

Service impact : During this maintenance, the servers in the affected rack will be gracefully shut down beforehand. Customers hosted on these servers should expect a planned service interruption for the duration of the maintenance window.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks W17A09 - W17A10 - W17A11 - W17A14 - W17B08 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 19, 06:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 23, 14:13 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our Bare Metal offer.

List of affected racks:

- Rack W17A09
- Rack W17A10
- Rack W17A11
- Rack W17A14
- Rack W17B08

Start time : 19/05/2026 06:00 UTC
End time : 19/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : All servers will be unavailable during maintenance.
Service improvement : Following our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will be doing a maintenance on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [GRA1][Cooling System] - Rack G121A15 Maintenance Notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 11, 04:00 - 07:00 UTC

Apr 7, 14:50 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Start time : 11/05/2026 04:00 UTC
End time : 11/05/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our cooling infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Racks T01B24/T01B25 migration notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 02:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 28, 20:42 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration in the racks T01B24/T01B25 to T01B26.

Start time : 07/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in racks T01B24/T01B25 will be unavailable during maintenance for 8 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [BHS1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack T01B24 migration notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 7, 02:00 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 28, 20:35 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a migration in the rack T01B24 to T01B76 and T01B77.

Start time : 07/05/2026 02:00 UTC
End time : 07/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers in rack T01B24 will be unavailable during maintenance for 8 hours.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a migration on our infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [WAW1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack W15A04 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 6, 08:30 - 10:00 UTC

Apr 22, 03:06 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Start time : 06/05/2026 08:30 UTC
End time : 06/05/2026 10:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during this maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our electrical infrastructure.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [ERI][Network] - Rack E103C07 maintenance notification
item.description:
THIS IS A SCHEDULED EVENT May 4, 23:30 UTC  -  May 5, 01:30 UTC

Apr 16, 18:27 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our network infrastructure.

Start time : 04/05/2026 23:30 UTC
End time : 05/05/2026 01:30 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance, the public network will be unavailable for 10 minutes, after which the vRack network will be unavailable for 10 minutes for the servers in the rack.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy of our network infrastructure, we will have to carry out interventions on multiple network equipment.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX5][Dedicated Servers] - Room 45F incident notification
item.description:
May 1, 01:31 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting the room 45F has been resolved.

Start time :01/05/2026 00:24 UTC
End time : 01/05/2026 01:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

May 1, 00:33 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific room.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 01/05/2026 00:24 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Impacted Service(s): The public network is currently experiencing instability (flapping) in the racks listed below :
45F07
45F08
45F09
45F10
45F11
45F12
45F13
45F14
45F15
45F16

Customers Impact : Customers may experience intermittent connectivity issues, packet loss, or latency when accessing their servers through the public network.
Root Cause : This incident is caused by a network equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101D03 maintenance notification
item.description:
May 1, 00:34 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 30, 19:48 UTC
Update - This maintenance is still in progress.
We will inform you when it's finished.

Apr 30, 11:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 12, 14:39 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 11:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 13:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101D03 to rack ERI0102D04C.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [RBX7][Dedicated Servers] - Rack R718A01 incident notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 22:28 UTC
Resolved - We would like to inform you that an incident occurred in the rack R718A01.
This incident has now been resolved.

Please find the details of this incident below :
Start time : 30/04/2026 22:18 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 22:23 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Vrack network was temporarily unavailable for servers located in the rack R718A01.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access and use their servers through vRack network.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by a network equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [RBX4][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 18:33 UTC
Completed - We are sorry to inform you that this maintenance is postponed to another date. We will keep you updated as soon as the date is fixed.

Apr 30, 14:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 24, 20:21 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 14:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 16:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 30 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [MR901][Dedicated Servers] - Room MR90101 incident notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 18:25 UTC
Resolved - We had an incident on Dedicated Servers offer on room MR90101 which has now been resolved.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 10:30 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 12:30 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the room MR90101 were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access and use their servers in room MR90101.
Root Cause : This incident was caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We thank you for your understanding and patience throughout this incident.

item.title: [SBG5][Dedicated Servers] - Rack SBG0504A06C incident notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 18:34 UTC
Monitoring - Service has been fully restored since 30/04/2026 17:10 UTC. Monitoring remains active to ensure long-term stability.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:24 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack SBG0504A06C were temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers were temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 17:52 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific rack SBG0504A06C.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:24 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : Some servers in the rack SBG0504A06C are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Some customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

item.title: [GLOBAL][Storage and Backups] - Backup Storage Maintenance Notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 12:44 UTC
Completed - We are sorry to inform you that this maintenance is postponed to another date. We will keep you updated as soon as the date is fixed.

Apr 30, 09:20 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Apr 30, 09:19 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, we will be carrying out a maintenance on our Backup Storage offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 09:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 21:00 UTC
Service impact : During the maintenance window, some storage will be temporarily unavailable for approximately 20 minutes.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy, we will be doing a maintenance on our Backup Storage offering to implement security and performance enhancements.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [ERI1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack E101B04 maintenance notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 12:04 UTC
Completed - The scheduled maintenance has been completed.

Apr 30, 05:00 UTC
In progress - Scheduled maintenance is currently in progress. We will provide updates as necessary.

Mar 3, 20:56 UTC
Scheduled - As part of our continuous improvement plan, maintenance is scheduled on our dedicated servers offer.

Start time : 30/04/2026 05:00 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 07:00 UTC
Service impact : Servers will be unavailable during the maintenance for 90 minutes each.
Service improvement : As part of our continuous improvement policy for our infrastructure, we will be relocating the servers currently located in rack E101B04 to rack ERI0102F05A.

Thank you for your understanding.

item.title: [LIM1][Dedicated Servers] - Rack Multiple racks incident notification
item.description:
Apr 30, 11:55 UTC
Resolved - We are pleased to inform you that the incident affecting our Dedicated Servers has been resolved.

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:49 UTC
End time : 30/04/2026 11:30 UTC
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 07:34 UTC
Update - We have new information regarding the incident that affected your service(s).

Please find below an update on the situation:
Update : Most servers are now operational again.
Ongoing Actions : Our team is working to fix the last remaining servers.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.

Apr 30, 07:00 UTC
Identified - We are currently experiencing an ongoing incident. We have determined the origin of the issue affecting our Dedicated Servers offer on the specific racks L114A07, L114B13, L114B17, L114B18, L114B19, L115B05, L115B10, L115A14 and L115A17.

Here are some supplementary details :

Start time : 30/04/2026 06:49 UTC
Impacted Service(s) : All servers in the racksL114A07, L114B13, L114B17, L114B18, L114B19, L115B05, L115B10, L115A14 and L115A17 are temporarily unavailable.
Customers Impact : Customers are temporarily unable to access their servers located on the specified racks
Root Cause : This incident is caused by an electrical equipment issue.
Ongoing Actions : The incident has been identified and our teams are mobilised to restore service as quickly as possible.

We will keep you updated on the progress and resolution.

We apologize for any inconvenience caused and appreciate your understanding.
